meaning: v.烧,烧焦,点(灯),使感觉烧热n.烧伤,灼伤
examples: Turn the heat down or it'll burn.
The power stations burn coal from the Ruhr region.
Incineration plants should be built to burn household waste.
His latest frequent topic: warning against high-burn rates and risk among the frothy startup ecosystem.
The cash burn information in the Sprint call today made two things crystal clear.
